# Widget Theory

A theoretical framework for understanding component interactions in complex systems.
Originally proposed by [Alice Smith](../People/Alice Smith.md) and refined through collaboration with [Bob Jones](../People/Bob Jones.md).

## Key Properties
- Composable: widgets can be nested arbitrarily
- Observable: state changes propagate predictably
- Related to [Gadget Pattern](./Gadget Pattern.md) as a practical application

## Applications
See [Acme Project](../Ideas/Acme Project.md) for a production implementation.
